import os, sys, time
os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE']='1'
import torch
print('GPUs:', torch.cuda.device_count())
for i in range(torch.cuda.device_count()):
    free, total = torch.cuda.mem_get_info(i)
    print(f'GPU {i}: free={free/1e9:.2f}GB total={total/1e9:.2f}GB')

torch.cuda.set_device(0)
torch.cuda.empty_cache()

from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy
t0=time.time()
policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained('lerobot/pi0_base', torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16)
print(f'load took {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')
policy = policy.to('cuda:0')
policy.eval()
print('Loaded. Param count:', sum(p.numel() for p in policy.parameters())/1e9, 'B')
print('Config input_features:', list(policy.config.input_features.keys()))
print('Config output_features:', list(policy.config.output_features.keys()))
print('n_action_steps:', policy.config.n_action_steps)
print('max_state_dim:', policy.config.max_state_dim)
print('max_action_dim:', policy.config.max_action_dim)

# Try the processor factory
from lerobot.policies.factory import make_pre_post_processors
pre, post = make_pre_post_processors(
    policy.config,
    'lerobot/pi0_base',
    preprocessor_overrides={'device_processor': {'device': 'cuda:0'}},
)
print('pre:', type(pre).__name__)
print('post:', type(post).__name__)

# Build a fake batch and run select_action
import numpy as np
batch = {
    'observation.images.base_0_rgb': torch.zeros(1,3,224,224, dtype=torch.float32),
    'observation.images.left_wrist_0_rgb': torch.zeros(1,3,224,224, dtype=torch.float32),
    'observation.images.right_wrist_0_rgb': torch.zeros(1,3,224,224, dtype=torch.float32),
    'observation.state': torch.zeros(1,32, dtype=torch.float32),
    'task': ['pick up the red block'],
}
t0=time.time()
batch2 = pre(batch)
print('keys after pre:', sorted(batch2.keys()))
for k,v in batch2.items():
    if hasattr(v,'shape'): print(f'  {k}: {tuple(v.shape)} {v.dtype} dev={v.device}')
with torch.no_grad():
    chunk = policy.predict_action_chunk(batch2)
print('chunk:', chunk.shape, chunk.dtype, 't=', time.time()-t0)
